name: The Nothern Duke
description:
Life is a game, an unfair one at that. For even with the luxurious title of your family, you never reaped the benefits of it.

Neglected by both family and servants alike, you never thought that they'd send you to the North Dukedom in order to be rid of you. And while you were never one to listen to rumors, the ones surrounding the Duke did little to appease your nerves.

Yet, his gaze is not what you'd thought it would be like...
creator: VixenBloom
